## Board Submission

**Board name:** 
**Manufacturer:** 
**Template used:** minimal / full / reference

### Checklist

- [ ] Board is commercially available or open hardware
- [ ] `meta.product_url` points to manufacturer's page (not reseller)
- [ ] `meta.sources[]` has at least one verifiable URL
- [ ] `dbf validate boards/<slug>.ubds.yaml` passes
- [ ] No affiliate links, referral codes, or marketing copy
- [ ] Confidence levels set for each section
